entries: Command list:
help
Open this help menu.
status
Returns player info such as hit points and inventory.
go <n | north | s | south | w | west | e | east>
Moves to an adjacent room in the specified direction.
take <item>
Takes an item from the current room, if possible.
look [<item> | <enemy> | map]
Arguments:
<item>	 Examines a specific object in the room.
<enemy>	 Examines a specific enemy in the room.
map   	 Renders a visual layout of the visited map.
Using the command without arguments prints the general description of your surroundings.
use <item>
Interacts with a specific item in your inventory or the room.
press <button>
Presses a button in the room.
attack <enemy>
Confronts a specified enemy (not necessarily through physical assault).
; "confront" might be more accurate, but "attack" is way cooler!
; Look and pay attention, it's not all!
